u with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top equals space 3 i with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top minus 2 j with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top comma space v with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top equals negative i with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top plus 4 j with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top d a n space r with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top equals space 7 i with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top minus 8 j with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top. space J i k a space r with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top equals m u with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top plus n v with rightwards harpoon with barb upwards on top
